fragments.plaintext:
Kelvin leaves the world behind. 🌎

In his third marathon ever, Kelvin Kiptum sets a new World Record at the Chicago Marathon, running the fastest official marathon of all time.

Congratulations, Kelvin. In 2:00:35, you’re leading the charge on the future of Running. ✨

caption.text:

Rise to the challenge.
Climb the podium.
Claim the gold.

Bebe Vio sets the standard once again.

Congrats on your fourth gold at the World Championship. Where to next? 🏅

fragments.plaintext:
No one has crossed the finish line first in Berlin more times than Eliud Kipchoge.

Thank you for proving to the world that no human is limited. Congratulations on a historic 5th victory. 👑

Let It Rip.

fragments.plaintext:
Congratulations, Aryna Sabalenka on earning the women's world number one ranking and on a dazzling showing in New York.

Continue defining greatness. 🎾📈

fragments.plaintext:
The numbers speak for themselves.

🎾 3x Calendar Grand Slams
🎾 37x Major Titles
🎾 122x Consecutive Singles Matches Won (and counting)

Congratulations Diede de Groot on another incredible run in New York. You are a true trailblazer and dominant force like no other. 🏆

fragments.plaintext:
This season's forecast: reigning threes 👑
Congratulations Sabrina Ionescu on becoming the WNBA’s single season 3-point record holder. An incredible accomplishment during an amazing season. Keep getting buckets 🏀
